content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +1.26%, Auto +2.20%, IT +1.43%, and VIX -6.2% to 16.93. Book is up +1.24% on the day with all but one position green. Priority is locking in gains via SL trails rather than chasing fresh breakouts on a strong-up tape with 50% already deployed.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24050,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.56,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +8% with strong Q4 (PAT +18%, GNPA 0.93%). Current SL at 1040.56 already locks in ~5.7% gains - well above breakeven. Holding SL here as the level matches today's intraday support zone (~1035-1040). No-op confirm; keeping original target 1110 intact (within 52w high 1141)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge -2.2%. SL at 119 still intact. Fed decision today is binary - hold through event as gold remains structurally bid on geopolitics. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1445.00,
      "new_target": 1485.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +3.5% with strong Q4 (PAT +27%). Stock breaking out above 52w high at 1437. Trailing SL up from 1438 to 1445 to lock in ~2.3% minimum gain while giving room for continuation. Target unchanged at 1485 — close to current price, may book partial near there."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.9%. SL already at breakeven (404.50). No-op confirm. Stock near 52w high; Q4 results May 15 catalyst. Holding for target 425."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "new_target": 1810.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.0% with SL already at 1742 (breakeven+). Organon $11.75B deal raises leverage concerns and analyst caution on growth visibility. Keeping tight SL at 1742 — exit triggers automatically if deal-skepticism deepens. No-op confirm."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 319.00,
      "new_target": 335.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.5%. Tightening SL slightly from 318.50 to 319 (still below entry 320.50, locking near-breakeven). Record peak demand 256GW + transmission capex pipeline supportive. Target 335 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 475.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +3.0% with SL already at 475 (locks ~1.3% gain). Strong Q4 (PAT +11%), dividend Rs 26.75/share for FY26. Stock now above 52w high (476). No-op confirm — SL already trailing well."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 614.00,
      "new_target": 660.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.2%. SL at 614 already at breakeven+. Note: tomorrow Apr 30 is dividend record date — Rs 11/share ex-div will mechanically pull stock down ~1.8%. Current SL 614 may trigger on ex-div mechanics. Accepting that risk as Q4 was strong (+68% PAT). No-op confirm."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.56,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks 5.7% gain. Watching for break of 1035 to exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge through Fed event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1445.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing SL up to 1445 above entry, locking 2.3% gain on 52w-high breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; let it run toward target 425."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL above entry given Organon deal overhang."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 319.00,
      "reasoning": "Slight tightening to near-breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 475.00,
      "reasoning": "SL locks gain; momentum strong post Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 614.00,
      "reasoning": "Aware of ex-div risk tomorrow but Q4 strength supports holding."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GRSE +9% post-results but 49% MTD rally — too extended for fresh entry; watch for pullback to 2900-2950 zone. BHARTIARTL Q4 results today (binary event) — wait for post-result reaction. IIFL has earnings call today — avoid until result clarity. INTELLECT/TECHM in struggling IT sector despite today's bounce — pass. VBL extended after 30% MTD run — wait for consolidation. ITC at 311 target zone (R1 309) — momentum continuation possible but tobacco tax overhang caps upside. BANDHANBNK +10.5% on earnings beat — watch for entry on consolidation.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is +1.24% on the day with 50% deployed. Position management priority is correct on a strong tape — locking gains via SL trails on NESTLEIND and POWERGRID rather than adding new exposure. Cash buffer healthy at 50%. Power cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA) is now ~30% of capital — at sector cluster limit; no further power adds. 5-day performance is poor (14% win rate, profit factor 0.4x) — this argues strongly for discipline over activity. NO new entries today: existing book is doing the work, and Fed decision tonight is a binary I don't want to add fresh risk into. Note 3 stale OPEN orders (GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) — leaving them as their LIMITs are below current prices, no harm in waiting."
}
